entries.description: Agent Skills for Together AI platform — inference, training, embeddings, audio, video, images, function calling, and infrastructure. Covers serverless chat completions, image/video generation, fine-tuning, batch inference, evaluations, sandboxes, dedicated endpoints, and GPU clusters.

entries.name: twilio-developer-kit
entries.description: Twilio Skills provide procedural knowledge for AI coding agents — which APIs to use, in what order, and what to avoid. Covers SMS, Voice, WhatsApp, Verify, SendGrid, Compliance, and 30+ products.

entries.name: typescript-lsp
entries.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence

entries.name: ui5
entries.description: SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 plugin for coding agents. Create and validate UI5 projects, access API documentation, run UI5 linter, get development guidelines and best practices for UI5 development.

entries.name: ui5-modernization
entries.description: Complete UI5 modernization toolkit with workflow and specialized fix patterns for modernizing SAPUI5/OpenUI5 applications.

entries.name: ui5-typescript-conversion
entries.description: SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 plugin for coding agents. Convert JavaScript based UI5 projects to TypeScript.

entries.name: unreal-engine-skills-for-claude-code
entries.description: Control Unreal Editor directly from Claude Code via MCP. Hundreds of tools exposed via Unreal's ToolsetRegistry across 30+ toolsets: actors, blueprints, materials, Niagara, Control Rigs, Sequencer, State Trees, widgets, Gameplay Ability System, automation testing, and more.

entries.name: valtown
entries.description: Build and deploy on Val Town. Bundles the Val Town MCP server and platform skills (HTTP vals, cron/intervals, SQLite, email, OAuth, React UI, third-party integrations, templates).

entries.name: vanta
entries.description: The Vanta plugin connects Claude Code to Vanta's security and compliance platform through the Vanta MCP server. It combines Vanta's test-specific remediation intelligence with your local repository context to help you fix compliance failures faster.

entries.name: vanta-mcp-plugin
entries.description: The Vanta plugin connects Claude Code to Vanta's security and compliance platform through the Vanta MCP server. It combines Vanta's test-specific remediation intelligence with your local repository context to help you fix compliance failures faster.

entries.name: vercel
entries.description: Vercel deployment platform integration. Manage deployments, check build status, access logs, configure domains, and control your frontend infrastructure directly from Claude Code.

entries.name: vibe-prospecting
entries.description: Vibe Prospecting connects Claude to live B2B company and contact data so users can search, match, enrich, filter, and export prospects at scale. It turns natural-language requests into structured GTM workflows for lead generation, CRM enrichment, company research, executive discovery, and multi-step prospecting automation inside Claude Cowork and Claude Code.

entries.name: vsql-extension-builder
entries.description: Builds a VillageSQL extension for MySQL end-to-end through a 7-phase persona-driven workflow. Commonly used to port PostgreSQL extensions to MySQL.

entries.name: windsor-ai
entries.description: Connect Claude Code to 325+ business data sources via Windsor.ai. Query marketing, sales, CRM, ecommerce, finance, and analytics data from Google Ads, Meta, HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, Stripe, and hundreds more — directly from your terminal.

entries.name: wix
entries.description: Build, manage, and deploy Wix sites and apps. CLI development skills for dashboard extensions, backend APIs, site widgets, and service plugins with the Wix Design System, plus MCP server for site management.

entries.name: wordpress.com
entries.description: Uses Claude Code to create and edit WordPress sites with WordPress Studio before deploying changes to your WordPress.com site.

entries.name: workos
entries.description: WorkOS integration skills for AuthKit, SSO, Directory Sync, RBAC, Vault, Audit Logs, migrations, and API references.

entries.name: youdotcom-agent-skills
entries.description: You.com agent skills for web search, research with citations, and content extraction. Guided integrations for Vercel AI SDK, Claude Agent SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, crewAI, LangChain, Microsoft Teams.ai, direct REST API, and bash CLI.

entries.name: zapier
entries.description: Connect 8,000+ apps to your AI workflow. Discover, enable, and execute Zapier actions directly from your client.

entries.name: zilliz
entries.description: Zilliz Cloud management plugin with 14 skills covering cluster lifecycle, collection schema, vector search, index tuning, bulk import, RBAC, backups, and monitoring.

entries.name: zoom-plugin
entries.description: Claude plugin for planning, building, and debugging Zoom integrations across REST APIs, SDKs, webhooks, bots, and MCP workflows.

entries.name: zoominfo
entries.description: Search companies and contacts, enrich leads, find lookalikes, and get AI-ranked contact recommendations. Pre-built skills chain multiple ZoomInfo tools into complete B2B sales workflows.

entries.name: zscaler
entries.description: Manage Zscaler cloud security platform including ZPA (private access), ZIA (internet access), ZDX (digital experience), ZCC (client connector), EASM (attack surface), and Z-Insights (analytics). Create and manage policies, troubleshoot connectivity, audit security configurations, and investigate incidents across the full Zscaler ecosystem.

entries.name: zyte-web-data
entries.description: Web scraping skills for Claude Code powered by the Zyte API — scrape sites, generate and run Scrapy spiders, define extraction schemas, and ship to Scrapy Cloud.
